meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills to Scale SaaS Apps
content.seo_description: Break through development plateaus with Claude Code and Antigravity. An intermediate case study for freelancers building high-impact, professional-grade SaaS.
content.answer_block: To move past basic CRUD apps, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate architectural patterns and complex state management. By leveraging AI-agentic workflows, you can offload boilerplate coding, focus on high-level business logic, and deliver production-ready features in hours rather than days, significantly increasing your freelance project velocity.
content.intro:
You’ve been here: the client wants a 'simple' dashboard, but three days in, you’re drowning in state management bugs and repetitive API boilerplate. You’re shipping, but it feels like manual labor rather than engineering. The ceiling for a solo freelancer isn't talent; it’s the friction of implementation.

There is a better way. By shifting from manual coding to an agentic workflow using Claude Code and Antigravity, you transform your terminal into a lead architect. This isn't just about faster typing; it's about shifting your role from 'code monkey' to 'system orchestrator,' allowing you to deliver enterprise-grade complexity at solo-developer speeds.

steps.title: Architectural Blueprinting
steps.description: Define the system constraints and data models before writing a single line of code. This prevents technical debt early.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project requirements for a SaaS dashboard. Generate a clean, scalable directory structure and define the schema for user authentication and state management using TypeScript.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create project scaffolding based on the provided architecture.md file'

steps.title: Automated Boilerplate Injection
steps.description: Use AI to scaffold high-utility components that would usually take hours of repetitive work.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a reusable React component library with Tailwind CSS, focusing on accessible forms and high-performance data tables.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Create UI components for user dashboard using the established design system'

steps.title: API Layer Abstraction
steps.description: Standardize your API interactions to ensure consistent error handling and type safety across all endpoints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an API client wrapper that handles authentication, logging, and standardized error responses for a RESTful backend.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement axios interceptors and API service layer with full TypeScript coverage'

steps.title: Agentic Testing Loops
steps.description: Automate the test-driven development cycle by having Claude Code write and execute tests against your new features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate comprehensive unit tests for the newly created authentication module, covering edge cases for invalid tokens and expired sessions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'Run all tests and fix any failing edge cases in the auth module'

steps.title: Refactoring for Production
steps.description: Finalize the codebase by performing a deep audit to optimize bundle size and clean up unused imports.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current codebase for performance bottlenecks and suggest refactors for cleaner, more maintainable code.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Optimize project imports and perform a final code cleanup based on best practices'

pro_tips: Always provide Claude Code with a 'context.md' file in your root directory to keep the agent aligned with your specific coding style.
Use Antigravity to generate 'negative constraints' (e.g., 'Do not use external libraries for state management') to keep your dependencies lean.
Run Claude Code in 'interactive' mode when prototyping complex logic to maintain human oversight on critical architectural decisions.
Map your CLI commands to shell aliases to trigger complex agentic workflows in a single keystroke.
Treat your AI prompts as code; store your high-performing Antigravity prompts in a shared repository for future projects.
content.next_steps: Integrate a CI/CD pipeline to automatically run your Claude Code test suites on every push to main, ensuring your production code remains as robust as your local build.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the code and start architecting the future of your freelance business. With these tools, you'll reclaim your time and double your output quality. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
